text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a big holiday night, and I can hear bells
ringing from somewhere outside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Happy Holi... halluci... I'm hallucinating...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: N-not yet, but I think I'm getting there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite it being a festive occasion, Ryan has a
pained expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is coming up... All the top racers
are going to be there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And it'll be Oguri's last race. She's really strong to
begin with, but she'll be extra determined to
close things out with a huge win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: On top of that, all the racing fans in the country are gonna be rooting for her to win...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I have to beat her and take victory for myself,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten used to pressure from my races
against McQueen, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This is something totally different. The muscles in
my heart feel sore, like I've been readin' too many
romance mangas...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems to really be struggling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing to do... Let's throw a pity
party for ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We can eat a ton of carbs, dance till we drop,
and forget about all our worries!
choice_data_list: I... I don't think that'll help.
I... I don't think that'll help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't do this! My heart weights are too heavy to
lift!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let's get in that "hustle your muscle"
spirit! Hyaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, as our very unhealthy party is about to
begin...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who could that be? It's kinda late.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello-lo, Ryan! Been a while! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I-Ines?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were resting at the recovery center.
Did you... come to check up on me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Ines Fujin, Ryan's roommate who ran in the
Japanese Derby with her.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I get it. So that's why you were about to pig out on all this food.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. Even if I beat the top superstar, Oguri, it
just won't feel right.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I get where you're coming from, but are
you sure it's really like that?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think everyone has their own pick for who they
want to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: They each have favorites?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Right now I'm taking a break and doing
rehab at a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But when I see you working so hard, it makes me
want to return to racing as soon as I can.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Seeing all the effort you gave when we ran in the
Derby made me feel like I wanted to push harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I like Oguri a lot, but my favorite star... is you,
Ryan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I really want to see you win, so count that as one
girl who's rooting for your victory!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You've got me, and you've also got your trainer.
Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Geez, guys...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leaving some heartfelt words and a gift of
hot spring buns, Ines heads back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I understand I was wrong now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was so blinded by Oguri's brilliance I couldn't
see myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm a star too! And there are people out there
who wanna see me shine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm carryin' the same weight as Oguri. That's why I
have to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna win at the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll show everyone by crushing both the Takarazuka and Arima Grand Prix races!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll show everyone by crushing both the Takarazuka and Arima Grand Prix races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are others, too, fervently rooting for Mejiro
Ryan to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the—what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hi! I've been a member of your fan club since I
was little!

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan B
text_block_list.text: Do your best! We'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, who's that person next to you? What are
you two doing tonight on the holiday?

text_block_list.name: Ryan Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you about to celebrate together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... It's not like that! We were just about
to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
N-never mind. No comment on that! ...You can
direct all other questions to my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Geez, I forgot you were right here!
Please don't tell them anything from our talk
earlier!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's popularity has grown large enough for it to
hamper her private life, just like Oguri Cap.
